internal_consistency.description: All components of the spec pack are internally consistent and aligned with the role definition

authority_alignment.description: All authority sources are appropriately cited and aligned with the role requirements

functionality_coverage.description: All core functionalities required for the role are covered in the functionality map

scenario_coverage.description: Evaluation scenarios cover all major workflow stages and decision points

testing_results.description: All test scenarios have passed with high compliance scores

documentation_quality.description: All documentation meets quality standards and provides sufficient detail for implementation

structured_readiness.compliance: Meets all federal financial management requirements
structured_readiness.security: Aligned with NIST SP 800-53 security controls
structured_readiness.privacy: Compliant with AICPA trust services criteria
structured_readiness.interoperability: Compatible with existing federal financial systems
structured_readiness.maintainability: Well-documented with clear separation of concerns
